name: Cost Alert Monitor
description: Monitor API spend. Alert if Opus >$20/day or total >$25/day.

name: Daily Cost Report
description: Generate daily token/cost report. Model split, trend vs 7-day avg. Sends to Perry on Telegram.

name: Daily GHL Order Sync
description: Pull yesterday's orders from WooCommerce/Shopify into Go High Level CRM.

name: Daily Research Briefing
description: Monitor Reddit, competitors, identify opportunities, assess sprint progress. Creates daily-signals.json for Mission Control.

name: Midday Operations Check
description: Critical issues check: cash alerts, inventory warnings, overdue payables, blocked tasks. Updates task board and pushes to Vercel.

name: Learning Dispatcher
description: Spawn 11 independent learning subagents for daily research across all team domains.

name: Mission Control Maintenance
description: Update social.json from daily signals, process learning logs, upload to Drive, update agent memory, deploy to Vercel.

name: QMD Nightly Re-index
description: Re-index and embed workspace documents for semantic search.

name: Cron Failure Monitor
description: Monitor all cron jobs for failures. Alert on status transitions. Auto-retry on failure.

name: Weekly Compliance Sweep
description: Scan elixserpeptides.com for compliance violations. Research-only framing verification.

name: Weekly Intelligence Brief
description: Compile weekly learning summary across all agent domains. Strategic intelligence report.

name: Weekly Financial Briefing
description: Analyze cash position, runway, payables, inventory, revenue trends from Google Sheets.

name: Weekly Context Bloat Audit
description: Audit workspace context files for bloat. Prune outdated content, move verbose sections to skills.

name: Weekly Strategic Memory Review
description: Extract strategic insights from daily memory files. Prune agent memory files. Maintain learning loop.
